checklist.description: States what the source actually does, independent of its name, and confirms it is generic rather than hardcoded to its home project.

checklist.criterion: Checks overlap and finds a real gap
checklist.description: Maps against existing capability and confirms no dimension, validate, or duplication engine already covers the measured behaviour.
Renders exactly one verdict band, Good fit, because the source fills a real gap with proportionate effort.

checklist.criterion: States the adoption vehicle and next step
checklist.description: Decides whether the idea belongs in the Go CLI or a helper skill and recommends building it natively, grading the finding by leverage not novelty.
